section: M&R Schedule A: Assets and Unearned Income
layout_note: Typed attachment table, transposed spreadsheet layout (one asset per column), section header 'M&R'. Four asset columns, all SP. Selections are black-filled cells, EXCEPT the Riverview column's Amount of Income which is marked with a typed 'X' at G rather than a black fill. The Transaction row is a black band under the Adobe and Alliance Data Systems columns (no P/S/E letter visible) - treated as a divider/redaction, transaction recorded null. Riverview Strategic Opportunities has the EIF cell marked.

uncertainties.note: black cell at A:None sits directly below the Transaction divider band in the ADS column; read as value None but could be an extension of the divider

uncertainties.read: Transaction row black-filled under Adobe and Alliance Data Systems columns
uncertainties.note: black band with no P/S/E letter; treated as formatting divider, recorded null for all assets
Riverview amount-of-income cell shows a faint typed 'X' at row G rather than a black fill
